results.rendered_html:
grasta p. p. [gras karmaṇi kta]
1 Eaten, devoured.
2 Seized, stricken, affected, possessed; graha˚, vipad˚, jarā˚  U. 6. 39. 
3 Slurred; ˚muktaṃ  U. 5. 13 ; ˚āmiṣaṃ  Pt. 1. 193. 
4 Eclipsed.
5 Taken, seized.
— staṃ A word or sentence half-uttered or slurred over.
Comp.
— astaṃ the setting of the sun or moon while eclipsed.
— udayaḥ rising of the sun or moon while eclipsed.
